name.description: The name of the database in the Cloud SQL instance.

deletion_policy.description: The deletion policy for the database. Setting ABANDON allows the resource to be abandoned rather than deleted. This is useful for Postgres, where databases cannot be deleted from the API if there are users other than cloudsqlsuperuser with access. Possible values are: ABANDON, DELETE

instance.description: The name of the Cloud SQL instance.

charset.description: The charset value. Postgres databases only support a value of UTF8 at creation time.

collation.description: The collation value. Postgres databases only support a value of en_US.UTF8 at creation time.
